:::{.cards-grid .cards-grid--bottom}
:::{.info-card .info-card--plain .info-card--founders}
:::{.card-title}
Course founders
:::

:::{.people-list}
- **SciLifeLab Training Hub**
:::
:::

:::{.info-card .info-card--plain .info-card--contributors}
:::{.card-title}
Contributors
:::

:::{.people-list}
- **Open Science Team**
- **DDLS training collaborators**
:::
:::
:::
